message:
fix(web,mpsc): add JSON size limit, Form content-type check, MPSC FIFO fairness

- Json extractor now rejects bodies > 10 MiB with 413 Payload Too Large.
- Form extractor now validates Content-Type is application/x-www-form-urlencoded.
- try_reserve() now returns Full when async senders are queued, preventing
  FIFO starvation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
